name: Grilled Szechuan Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
----------------------SALAD DRESSING----------------------
3 tbsp Oil (vegetable)
2 tbsp Hot Soy Sauce (CHUN KING)
2 tbsp Pineapple Juice (from reserved)
1 tbsp White Vinegar
1 tbsp Honey
1/4 tsp Ginger (ground)
Lightly sprinkle both sides of the boneless, skinned chicken breasts with seasoned pepper. Grill and slice into strips. Reserve 2 tablespoons of pineapple juice from the can of pineapple slices. Prepare Salad Dressing as follows: Brush the pineapple slices with some of the Salad Dressing, grill for 2-3 minutes. Arrange the chicken and pineapple over lettuce and vegetables. Top with the remaining Salad Dressing.
SALAD DRESSING: In a covered jar, combine oil, hot soy sauce, pineapple juice, white vinegar, honey, and ground ginger. Shake well.
